# Contributing

At the present time, this repository does not directly invite any external
contributors, such as in the form of PRs, and there are no immediate plans to extend the game
beyond its current state. Attention will be focused on stabilizing
and maintaining it while other games are launched. That is the 
current, provisional policy.

That being said, if you would like to expand the functionality or
introduce some new aspects to the game, I am open to discussing
any new ideas, and you encouraged to raise them
on the Discussions tab first. As mentioned, this is simply
due to the fact that immediate attention is focused on launching
and stabilizing this and other GitHub-native games.

If you find these GitHub-native experiences as fun and interesting
as I do, and would like to get involved, feel free to reach out
to the maintainer at `games @ hesreallyhim.com`.
